Why we made Remira

From the diabetics who brought you the Remira T1D TikTok community

TikTok
@remira.t1d This is who we build for. Watch the T1D community behind Remira.
Watch on TikTok

We built the app we wish we'd had

We live with Type 1, and we built Remira to make T1D easier for us. It's made for everyone, from new diabetics and parents who are still learning their patterns, to experienced diabetics who want peace of mind. Remira makes it easy to understand, prevent, and improve your patterns over time.

Sign up to be notified when Premium launches September 1st. Click here for information on how we chose to price Remira.

Features

Predict. Reflect. Build Community.

Remira makes T1D easier both mentally and physically so that it takes up less of your time and energy.

Live glucose · Predictive alerts

A forecast for hours ahead

Remira does more than guess. It reads your past and present CGM readings to learn your patterns over time. It makes personalized warnings and suggestions to show what's coming.

Understand the when, what, and why so that you can improve.

  • See what is likely in the next few hours
  • Simple logging that stays out of your way
  • Tuned to your body, not a generic average
See the stats · Get in range

Understand the why, and get better

Decision Zones show you the what, when, and why behind your highs and lows. See your biggest areas to work on and the steps to take, then watch your progress over time.

  • Estimated glucose management indicator and time in range
  • Reminders you set for yourself
  • Effortless tracking of what really affects you
Share your day · Invite your friends

Face Type 1 together

Add a DiaBuddy and keep each other in it. Share the good days, the hard days, and the small wins. Build a streak together and feel a little less alone in it.

  • Share your journey with someone who gets it
  • Check ins, insights, and honest days
  • A safe place for support and connection

Can Remira actually predict my blood sugar?

Not exactly, and we will never pretend otherwise.

Remira works like a weather forecast. It looks at your recent trend, your routine, and what happened the last time your day looked like this, then tells you what is likely. A forecast is a warning, not a promise. Rain does not always come.

A forecast, not a promise

Every heads up comes with a range, not a single number. We show you how confident we are.

We show our work

Every warning tells you why it fired. "You are 45 minutes past lunch and climbing, and the last six Fridays this turned into a high."

We show our record

Remira keeps score of its own accuracy and shows it to you. When we get it wrong, you will know.

Remira also cannot see everything. It does not know about the pizza you are about to order, unless you tell it. The more you tell it, the sharper it gets.

Remira is not an alarm system. Keep your CGM alerts turned on. Remira is a wellness tool. It does not diagnose, does not recommend insulin doses, and does not replace your care team.

Pricing

Less than a cup of coffee a month for peace of mind

Remira Premium is $4.99 a month, or $39.99 a year.

Why it costs what it costs

Remira is sophisticated. No other app is as accurate, and building it, keeping it accurate, and running it safely takes real money and real time.

We are not a big company. Your subscription is what keeps Remira alive, and it is also what lets us give back to the online T1D community that raised us.

For everything you get, and everything it helps you avoid, it is worth it.

Join the waitlist and get 3 weeks of Premium free at launch. Everyone else gets one week. You are not charged anything today.

Our story

Why we made Remira

Remira started in a personal place. Living with Type 1 means making hundreds of small decisions every day, and still lying awake wondering if you got them right. We were tired of apps that only showed us what already happened, long after we could do anything about it.

So we built the tool we always wanted. One that sees the moment coming and gives us a heads up early. One that helps us learn what actually drives our highs and lows, instead of guessing. One that makes getting better feel possible instead of exhausting.

We are still learning and improving with every person who joins. That is the whole point. Remira gets more personal the more it gets to know you, and we get better the more we hear from you.

See for yourself

Bring someone with you

Type 1 is easier with someone else in it

Remira works better when the people who get it are in it with you. Send this to one other person living with Type 1, or one other parent who lies awake the same way you do. Everyone you bring is one more DiaBuddy waiting for you at launch.

FAQ

Questions, answered honestly

The things you are probably wondering, including the ones most apps would rather avoid.

Can Remira actually predict my blood sugar?

Not exactly, and we will never pretend otherwise. Remira works like a weather forecast. It reads your recent trend, your routine, and what happened the last time your day looked like this, then tells you what is likely.

A forecast is a warning, not a promise. Every heads up comes with a range and how confident we are, and Remira keeps score of its own accuracy so you always know how much to trust it. Keep your CGM alarms on. Remira is a wellness tool, not an alarm system.

Is my data private? Do you share or sell it?

Yes, it is private, and no, we never sell or share it. Full stop. Remira is HIPAA compliant, your information is encrypted, and it is used only to make your own forecasts and insights better.

It is your data. You can ask us to delete it at any time, and we will.

Why does Premium cost money? Is it worth it?

Remira is sophisticated, and no other app is as accurate. Building it, keeping it accurate, and running it safely takes real money and time. Premium is $4.99 a month or $39.99 a year, less than a cup of coffee a month.

We are not a big company, so your subscription is what keeps Remira alive, and part of what we make goes back into the online T1D community that raised us. For everything you get, and everything it helps you avoid, we think it is worth it.

Is Remira a medical device?

No. Remira is a wellness tool. It does not diagnose, does not recommend insulin doses, and does not replace your CGM alarms or your care team. Always keep your CGM alerts on and talk to your doctor about treatment decisions.

Do I need a CGM to use Remira?

Yes. Remira reads your continuous glucose monitor data to learn your patterns and build your forecast. The more it sees, and the more you tell it, the sharper it gets.

Which sensors and phones does Remira work with?

Remira works with Dexcom and FreeStyle Libre sensors. For now it is available on iPhone only. Android support is on our list, and joining the waitlist is the best way to hear when it is ready.

When does Premium launch, and what does the waitlist get me?

Premium launches September 1. Everyone on the waitlist gets 3 weeks of Premium free at launch, and everyone else gets one week. Joining is free and you are not charged anything today. The free Remira app is already on the App Store.

How do I contact you?

We would love to hear from you. The fastest way is a DM on TikTok at @remira.t1d. You can also email us at contact@remira-ai.com.

We are two people who live with Type 1, so a real human will always answer.
